channel.title: untagged on Hello, I'm Jae
channel.description: Recent content in untagged on Hello, I'm Jae

item.title: 10 weeks challenge - day 01
item.description: Overview I’m starting a web development challenge with Nomadcoders(nomadcoders.co). This 10 weeks challenge is to review my JS knowledges and to start bootstrapping my ideas. I don’t think this would cover everything, but I’m just hoping that I can meet some people who can talk about programming and have fun. Today I learned (reviewed) basic understanding on HTML, CSS and JS environment setup Resources kokoa clone 1.5 - 1.

item.title: Selection Tool in Maya
item.description: I’ve been working on the selection tool which can select objects by an proxy object. The proxy can be a cube or sphere, and same logic is implemented to the camera distance selection as well. The main concept came from a blog post about frustum culling. It refers something like basic collision logic. To do this, I needed normal vector and a point for each planes. Every objects in the scene will be checked if the farthest bbox point is on the same direction of plane normal or not.
